description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface, creating a ribbed texture. The grooves are deep and dark, contrasting with the lighter, marbled stone surface between them. The block is solid and robust, with sharp, clean edges and a uniform thickness. Its sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, industrial look. The coloration is predominantly dark gray to black, with subtle variations in tone that suggest a natural stone material. This block is likely used as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments, such as on sidewalks, plazas, or parking areas.
description: A rectangular, grooved stone block with a ribbed, dark gray surface and smooth sides, designed for use as an urban barrier or obstacle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the block with parallel grooves running horizontally across the top surface.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlights the depth and spacing of the grooves, emphasizing the ribbed texture.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same horizontal grooves and blocky form.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view again shows the deep, evenly spaced grooves and the block's thickness.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a leveled gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
